name: @tetherto/mdk-plugin-auth
description: Auth and identity APIs: userinfo, token refresh, permissions, and external data lookups.

200.description: Authenticated user profile from the validated JWT.

routes.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile from the validated JWT.
constraints: Requires a valid Bearer token in the Authorization header.

routes.description: Issues a new JWT from an existing valid token, optionally scoping TTL and roles.
constraints: Requires a valid Bearer token. New token inherits original IPs unless overridden.

200.description: Permission set encoded in the current token.

routes.description: Returns the permission set encoded in the current token.

200.description: External data result from the ORK network.

400.description: Invalid query JSON or missing type parameter.

routes.description: Proxies an external data request to the ORK network by type and optional query filter.
constraints: Requires a valid Bearer token. type is mandatory.
